```{r}
library(readxl)
library(arrow)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```

# Main
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-main.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "市")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```


```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

# export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/main/All-TIE.xlsx')
# export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/main/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_19 <- subset(dat, year == 2019)
m_fee_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_19)
summary(m_reimburse_int_19)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/main/19-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/main/19-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_20 <- subset(dat, year == 2020)
m_fee_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_20)
summary(m_reimburse_int_20)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/main/20-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/main/20-OOT.xlsx')
```


```{r}
dat_21 <- subset(dat, year == 2021)
m_fee_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_21)
summary(m_reimburse_int_21)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/main/21-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/main/21-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_22 <- subset(dat, year == 2022)
m_fee_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_22)
summary(m_reimburse_int_22)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/main/22-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/main/22-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_23 <- subset(dat, year == 2023)
m_fee_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_23)
summary(m_reimburse_int_23)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/main/23-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/main/23-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_24 <- subset(dat, year == 2024)
m_fee_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_24)
summary(m_reimburse_int_24)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/main/24-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/main/24-OOT.xlsx')
```

# Sensitivity - onlyhp
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-sensitivity-onlyhp.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "市")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```


```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/All-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_19 <- subset(dat, year == 2019)
m_fee_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_19)
summary(m_reimburse_int_19)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/19-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/19-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_20 <- subset(dat, year == 2020)
m_fee_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_20)
summary(m_reimburse_int_20)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/20-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/20-OOT.xlsx')
```


```{r}
dat_21 <- subset(dat, year == 2021)
m_fee_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_21)
summary(m_reimburse_int_21)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/21-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/21-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_22 <- subset(dat, year == 2022)
m_fee_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_22)
summary(m_reimburse_int_22)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/22-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/22-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_23 <- subset(dat, year == 2023)
m_fee_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_23)
summary(m_reimburse_int_23)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/23-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/23-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_24 <- subset(dat, year == 2024)
m_fee_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_24)
summary(m_reimburse_int_24)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/24-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-onlyhp/24-OOT.xlsx')
```


# Sensitivity - unchanged
## main
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-sensitivity-unchanged.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "市")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```


```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/All-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_19 <- subset(dat, year == 2019)
m_fee_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_19)
summary(m_reimburse_int_19)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/19-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/19-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_20 <- subset(dat, year == 2020)
m_fee_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_20)
summary(m_reimburse_int_20)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/20-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/20-OOT.xlsx')
```


```{r}
dat_21 <- subset(dat, year == 2021)
m_fee_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_21)
summary(m_reimburse_int_21)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/21-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/21-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_22 <- subset(dat, year == 2022)
m_fee_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_22)
summary(m_reimburse_int_22)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/22-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/22-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_23 <- subset(dat, year == 2023)
m_fee_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_23)
summary(m_reimburse_int_23)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/23-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/23-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_24 <- subset(dat, year == 2024)
m_fee_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_24)
summary(m_reimburse_int_24)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/24-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/sensitivity-unchanged/24-OOT.xlsx')
```

# Covid Before
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-sensitivity-covid-before.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

# data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "市")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```

```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/Sensitivity-covid/before/All-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/Sensitivity-covid/before/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

# Covid After
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-sensitivity-covid-after.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

# data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "市")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```

```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 市),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/Sensitivity-covid/after/All-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/Sensitivity-covid/after/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

# External Validation
```{r}
data <- read_parquet("File/Part Data/part1-external-validation.parquet")
```

```{r}
data$年龄 <- as.numeric(data$年龄)
data$性别 <- factor(data$性别, levels = c(0, 1))
data$year <- as.numeric(format(as.Date(data$入院时间), "%Y"))
data$医疗付款方式 <- factor(data$医疗付款方式,
    levels = c("SP", "UEBMI", "URRBMI", 'GS', 'COI'))
data$heart <- factor(data$heart, levels = c(0, 1))
data$brain <- factor(data$brain, levels = c(0, 1))
data$kidney <- factor(data$kidney, levels = c(0, 1))

# data$市 <- as.factor(data$市)

data$sum_fee_log <- log1p(data$sum_fee + 1)
data$sum_reimbursement_log <- log1p(data$sum_reimbursement + 1)
```

```{r}
vars_needed <- c("sum_fee_log", "sum_reimbursement_log", "年龄", "性别", "year", "医疗付款方式", "heart", "kidney", "brain", "现住址邮政编码")
dat <- na.omit(data[, vars_needed])

dat$age_c  = scale(dat$年龄, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
dat$year_c = scale(dat$year,  center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)[,]
```

```{r}
export_fixed_effects <- function(model, file_path, conf_level = 0.95) {
  
  # 模型类型检查
  # 提取固定效应系数和标准误
  coef_est <- fixef(model)
  vcov_mat <- vcov(model)
  se_est <- sqrt(diag(vcov_mat))
  
  # 获取系数汇总表（用于 t 值和 p 值）
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  
  # 计算 Wald 置信区间（正态近似）
  alpha <- 1 - conf_level
  z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
  lower_orig <- coef_est - z_crit * se_est
  upper_orig <- coef_est + z_crit * se_est
  
  # 转换到原始尺度：exp(β) - 1
  estimate_trans <- round((exp(coef_est) - 1) * 100, 2)
  lower_trans <- round((exp(lower_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  upper_trans <- round((exp(upper_orig) - 1) *100, 2)
  
  # 构建结果数据框
  result_df <- data.frame(
    term = names(coef_est),
    # 转换后尺度（原始 y 的近似）
    estimate_transformed = estimate_trans,
    lower_CI_transformed = lower_trans,
    upper_CI_transformed = upper_trans,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 保存为 Excel
  writexl::write_xlsx(result_df, path = file_path)
  
  # 提示信息
  message("结果已保存至：", file_path)
}
```

```{r}
m_fee_int <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + year_c + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int)
summary(m_reimburse_int)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/All-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/All-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_19 <- subset(dat, year == 2019)
m_fee_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_19 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_19, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_19)
summary(m_reimburse_int_19)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/19-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_19, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/19-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_20 <- subset(dat, year == 2020)
m_fee_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_20 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_20, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_20)
summary(m_reimburse_int_20)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/20-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_20, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/20-OOT.xlsx')
```


```{r}
dat_21 <- subset(dat, year == 2021)
m_fee_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_21 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别  + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_21, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_21)
summary(m_reimburse_int_21)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/21-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_21, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/21-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_22 <- subset(dat, year == 2022)
m_fee_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_22 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_22, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_22)
summary(m_reimburse_int_22)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/22-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_22, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/22-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_23 <- subset(dat, year == 2023)
m_fee_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_23 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_23, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_23)
summary(m_reimburse_int_23)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/23-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_23, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/23-OOT.xlsx')
```

```{r}
dat_24 <- subset(dat, year == 2024)
m_fee_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_fee_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)

m_reimburse_int_24 <- lmer(
  sum_reimbursement_log ~ age_c + 性别 + heart + brain + kidney + 医疗付款方式 + (1 | 现住址邮政编码),
  data = dat_24, REML = TRUE
)
summary(m_fee_int_24)
summary(m_reimburse_int_24)

export_fixed_effects(m_fee_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/24-TIE.xlsx')
export_fixed_effects(m_reimburse_int_24, 'File/Result/Part1/external validation/24-OOT.xlsx')
```
